speaker: charlie
text: Right, let's talk sport! <cite index='31-4,31-5'>Perth's Jack Della Maddalena defended home turf against Brazilian knockout artist Carlos Prates at RAC Arena on May 2</cite>, and by all accounts it was an absolute thriller that had the crowd on their feet.

speaker: alice
text: And staying in the region, our young Matildas were in action today too. <cite index='36-4,36-5,36-6'>India suffered a 2-0 defeat to Australia in their AFC U17 Women's Asian Cup opener, with Australia taking the lead through Theodora Mouithys before doubling their advantage with an own goal</cite>.

speaker: charlie
text: The future's looking bright for Australian women's football. These young players are gaining invaluable experience on the international stage, and you can bet we'll be seeing some of them representing the senior Matildas in years to come.
